scope: One-piece full-width dock band per operator direction after two FQ-20 rejections; vessel sockets for future liquid mechanics; no other lanes touched.
summary: The dock is no longer reassembled from stretched fragments. Four pieces sliced whole from the blueprint mockup span the screen edge-to-edge: the health orb cap (glass punched, liquid underneath, value on the glass), a clean plate segment mirror-extended and TILED (the grain reads as paneling instead of smeared streaks or fence pickets), a fixed center block whose slot track was rebuilt with five uniform frames (the baked track varied and had slot 3 painted selected), and the attunement crystal cap whose charge is a luminous bottom-up overlay over the intact painted crystal. A geometry sidecar written by the slicer feeds every runtime coordinate, ending the hand-synced-constant masking bugs. Nav buttons are invisible click zones over the baked art with hover sheen; selection is a gold frame overlay; command chips sit between the pedestals; the summary floats as a chip above the plate. Vessel sockets let the operator's planned liquid mechanics swap in any Range-derived fill without touching HUD layout - proven in smoke by swapping a stub in and back. Isolated-worktree smoke 319/319; two visual iteration loops at the operator's native window scale caught tile contamination, picket repetition, and hinge-covered key tags before shipping.
acceptance: Band spans the viewport edge-to-edge with native-aspect pieces (fq21_dock_band_one_piece)
Health pool drains under punched glass; attunement charge brightens the intact crystal; values on the glass
All runtime geometry from dock_band_geometry.json (no hand-synced coordinates)
Isolated worktree smoke 319/319; strict audit clean; pixel verifier green; band thirds reviewed at 1917x1033
validation: scripts/art/verify_pixel_assets.py -> PASS (chrome width bound 700 for the 662px block)
rendered tours at 1917x1033 -> band thirds inspected through two iteration loops
decisions: One-piece native-aspect pieces; only the clean plate strip tiles - stretching and per-pixel color keying are banned from the band pipeline
The slot track is rebuilt uniformly in the slicer because the baked slots varied; runtime selection is a gold overlay (the baked band cannot raise a slot)
The attunement crystal stays baked; charge is a translucent brightener (punching a crystal destroys the art)
Values render ON the glass per the blueprint; the dock hint line is dropped in band mode (goal hints and tooltips teach controls)
Vessel fills are sockets: any Range-derived control plugs in for the future liquid mechanics
Main-tree smoke contamination from concurrent Codex files (opening cels, player gear) is acknowledged operator-sanctioned concurrent work; FQ-21 verifies in a clean worktree
risks: Operator visual acceptance in motion is the real gate; an instance ships with the report
Codex's uncommitted opening/gear files still break two shared-tree smoke checks until that lane lands or is reverted
next_action: Operator reviews the band in the launched instance; then FQ-22 (Diablo-1 drag-drop inventory) or wiring the liquid mechanic into the vessel socket.
